item.title: AIM movers: Harvest Minerals acquires rare earth prospects and strong trading at IQE
item.summary: Fertiliser producer Harvest Minerals (LON: HMI) is acquiring a portfolio of eight rare earth projects in Brazil for A$200,000 and 40 million shares, plus a further A$300,000 on achievement of milestones. Harvest Minerals also takes on A$1.5m of previously agreed deferred payments and a 1.5% royalty obligation. Two projects are highly prospective for ionic clay-hosted […] The post AIM movers: Harvest Minerals acquires rare earth prospects and strong trading at IQE appeared first on UK Investor Magazine .
